# kEAGLColorFormatRGBA8

**Global Variable**

Specifies a 32-bit RGBA format that corresponds to the OpenGL ES `GL_RGBA8888` format.

## Declaration

```swift
let kEAGLColorFormatRGBA8: String
```
title: kEAGLColorFormatRGBA8
